attacks.name: Brush Aside
attacks.text: If Sharpedo has any Holon Energy cards attached to it, this attack does 30 damage to 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokemon.

attacks.name: Swift Turn
attacks.text: If the Defending Pokemon has Fighting Resistance, this attack does 50 damage plus 20 more damage.

tests.description: Test Brush Aside does bench damage with Holon Energy
